zh.lifeSummary: 當Sally Tryon於1785年1月19日出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德時，她的父親William Tryon32歲，母親Anna Hurlburt33歲。她於1803年10月10日與Solomon Arad Way在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德法明頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1868年3月12日在美國伊利諾州喬 代維斯斯托克頓 堂史普享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sally Tryon于1785年1月19日出生在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德时，她的父亲William Tryon32岁，母亲Anna Hurlburt33岁。她于1803年10月10日与Solomon Arad Way在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1868年3月12日在美国伊利诺伊州喬 代維斯斯托克頓 堂史普享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tryon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, Rutland and Northamptonshire): altered form of Dutch Trion, itself a shortened variant of Tirion, a cognate of Walloon and French Thiry .

History: A Northamptonshire family of this name trace their descent from Peter Trieon (died 1611), who went to England from the Netherlands c. 1562. His son, Moses Tryon, was high sheriff of Northamptonshire in 1624. William Tryon (born 1729 in Surrey, England) was the last provincial governor of NY; he gave his name to Tryon County, the district which took in the Mohawk Valley; after the American Revolution this huge area was split into Montgomery, Fulton, and other counties.

variants.name: Thiry
meanings: Walloon, French (mainly Lorraine and Ardennes), and Luxembourgish: from the personal name Thiry, a regional variant of French Thierry . This surname is also found in Germany and in the Flemish part of Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Sally
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In origin a pet form of Sarah , but from the 20th century normally considered an independent name. It is frequently used as the first element in combinations such as Sally-Anne and Sally-Jane.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Connecticut Becomes the 5th State
historicEvents.description: Connecticut became a state on January 9, 1788. In 1650, before it was a state, the boundary of Connecticut ran north from the westside of Greenwich Bay and the coast of the Pacific Ocean. During the 1600s, Westmoreland County was in Connecticut when the boundaries were changed Westmoreland County went to Pennsylvania.
Historical Boundaries: 1827: Jo Daviess, Illinois, United States

historicEvents.title: Farmington Canal Opened
historicEvents.description: Farmington Canal spans 2,476 acres, starting from New Haven, Connecticut, and on to Northampton, Massachusetts. The groundbreaking for the canal was in 1825 and opened in 1829.
historicEvents.urlTitle: ConnecticutHistory.org- New England's Grand Ambition:The Farmington Canal

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Land in Groton Given to US Navy for Navy Station
historicEvents.description: In 1868, the State of Connecticut gave the Navy 112 acres of land along the Thames River. This became the location of the Naval Submarine Base. It was designed to hold 1,400 men and 20 submarines. During WWII it was expanded to 497 acres.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Military Analysis Network- Naval Submarine Basr New London Groton CT

en.lifeSummary: When Sally Tryon was born on 19 January 1785, in Hartford, Connecticut, United States, her father, William Tryon, was 32 and her mother, Anna Hurlburt, was 33. She married Solomon Arad Way on 10 October 1803, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 12 March 1868, in Stockton Township, Jo Daviess, Illinois, United States, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sally Tryon est née le 19 janvier 1785, à Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, William Tryon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Hurlburt, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Solomon Arad Way le 10 octobre 1803, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1868, à Stockton Township, Jo Daviess, Illinois, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sally Tryon am 19. Januar 1785 in Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Tryon 32 und ihre Mutter Anna Hurlburt 33. Sie hat am 10. Oktober 1803 in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Solomon Arad Way geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1868 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Stockton Township, Jo Daviess, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sally Tryon è nata il il 19 gennaio 1785 nel Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, William Tryon, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anna Hurlburt, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Solomon Arad Way il 10 ottobre 1803, nel Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1868, nel Stockton Township, Jo Daviess, Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sally Tryonが1785年1月19日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードで生まれた時，父William Tryonは32歳，母Anna Hurlburtは33歳であった。1803年10月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンでSolomon Arad Wayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1868年3月12日にアメリカ合衆国イリノイ州ジョー ダヴィエスストクトン トウンシュイップで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sally Tryon(이)가 1785년 1월 19일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Tryon(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Hurlburt(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1803년 10월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 Solomon Arad Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1868년 3월 12일 미국 일리노이 주 조 데이비스 스톡턴 타운시프에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sally Tryon nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1785, em Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, William Tryon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anna Hurlburt, tinha 33 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sally Tryon родилась 19 января 1785 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени William Tryon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Hurlburt, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Solomon Arad Way 10 октября 1803 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 12 марта 1868 г. в местности стокктон тоуншип, джо дэвиесс, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет.
